risk_rationale: The draft bill introduces new requirements for age verification mechanisms and mandates non-sharing of age verification data with third parties, which are not currently addressed in TikTok's internal baseline. While personalized advertising to minors is already prohibited, the additional requirements present a material compliance gap that requires immediate attention.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states personalized ads are not allowed for under-18 users.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: No gap in personalized advertising prohibition, but additional requirements for age verification mechanisms and data handling are not covered.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Current age assurance posture relies on machine learning and safety reviews, not explicit age verification mechanisms.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok's data localization/security programs do not specify non-sharing of age verification data with third parties.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Mandates non-sharing of age verification data with third parties.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Current policies do not explicitly address the non-sharing of age verification data with third parties.

remediations.title: Implement Age Verification Mechanisms
remediations.description: Develop and integrate robust age verification mechanisms to comply with the draft bill requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification mechanism is implemented and operational

remediations.title: Update Data Handling Policies
remediations.description: Revise data handling policies to ensure age verification data is not shared with third parties.
acceptance_criteria: No age verification data is shared with third parties

business_impact: Failure to comply with the draft bill could result in significant legal and financial penalties, as well as reputational damage.
recommended_actions: Initiate development of age verification mechanisms
Revise data handling policies to align with new requirements
Engage with legal and policy teams to monitor the progress of the draft bill
